    isCaseClassInpatient() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
    isCaseClassInpatientOrShortStay() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
    isCaseClassOutpatient() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    is the case class counted as "outpatient" regarding the json data specification (plus pre-stationary + post-stationary cases that are counted as "outpatient" logic-wise in the workflow aswell)
    isCaseClassShortStay() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Is the case class counted as "inpatient" regarding the json data specification (without pre-stationary and post-stationary cases)?
    isCaseTypeIntensiveStationary() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    A simple check if the given contact type got the value "intensivstationaer".
    isCaseTypePostStationary() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    A simple check if the given contact type got the value "prestationary".
    isCaseTypePreStationary() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    A simple check if the given contact type got the value "prestationary".

    Looking if code is existing in the given terminology system.
    isCodeInAnyCodeableConcepts(List, List) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    This method checks whether a given set of CodeableConcept contains any of the codes without checking the Coding.getSystem() entry.
    isCodeInAnyCodeableConcepts(CodeableConcept, List) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
     
    isCodeInAnyCoding(List, Collection) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    Checks whether any of the given Coding entries contains a code that matches any of the provided reference codes, without considering the Coding.getSystem() entry.
    isCodeInCodeableConcepts(List, String, List) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    This method checks whether a given set of CodeableConcept contains any of the codes in the given code system, to the given system.
    isCodeInCodesystem(String, Collection) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    Does the given fhir Coding contain a value that is part of the given code system.
    isCodeInCodesystem(List, Collection, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    Does the given list of fhir Codings contain a value that is part of the given code system.
    isCodeInCodesystem(List, Collection, Collection) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    Checks if any of the given Codings contains a value that is part of at least one of the specified code systems.
    isCodeOfFirstCodeableConceptEquals(List, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    This method retrieves the first Coding.getCode() of the first Coding and checks if it matches the passed reference code.
    isCodeOfFirstCodingEquals(List, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirCodingTools
    This method retrieves the first Coding.getCode() of the first Coding and checks if it matches the passed reference code.

    Checking if the given coding of a CodeableConcept got a code that is part of the given value set.

    isMoreThanOneDayOlder(Date, Date) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.generic.time.DateTools
    Determines whether the difference between two dates is more than one day.
    isMoreThanXDaysOlder(Date, Date, int) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.generic.time.DateTools
    Determines whether the difference between two dates is more than a given amount of day(s).
    isObservationValueGivenType(MiiObservation, DashboardLogicFixedValues, QualitativeLabCodesSettings) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.tools.ObservationFilter
     
    isOpsCodeInProcedure(MiiProcedure, Collection) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirProcedureTools
    Checks whether a given MiiProcedure contains any coding whose system equals OPS and whose code is contained in the provided collection of SNOMED CT codes.
    isOpsCodeInProcedureWithPrefixWildcardCheck(MiiProcedure, Collection) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirConditionTools
    Checks if the given MiiProcedure contains any OPS code that is subsumed by one of the provided OPS codes via prefix matching (e.g., 5-480 matches 5-480.2).
    isOpsCodePrefixInProcedure(MiiProcedure, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirProcedureTools
    Checks whether the given MiiProcedure contains at least one OPS coding whose code starts with the specified OPS code prefix.
    isPatDataRetroUsage(Date) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
    Checks if "Patientendaten retrospektiv verarbeiten, nutzen" is permitted (via single L1 code or all L2 codes).
    isPatDataUsage(Date) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
    Checks only whether the patient data usage provision code is permitted (via single L1 code or all L2 codes).
    isPatDataUsageAllowed(Date) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
    Checks if patient data usage is allowed based on consent form, policy, and specific provision code.
    isPatDataUsageCurrentlyAllowed() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
     
    isPatientDeceased() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Determine via the discharge disposition which is part of Encounter.getHospitalization() whether the patient is deceased within the scope of the case under review.
    isPeriodStartExistent() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Encounter.period.start is a mandatory field in the kds profile.
    isPrivacyPolicyDocumentAndMiiConsentCategory() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
     
    isProcedureNeededForAcribis(MiiProcedure) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.AcribisChecks

    isProcedureNeededForKiRaPed(MiiProcedure) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.KiRaChecks
     
    isProcedureStatusValid(Procedure) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ResourceHandler
    Filtering of not-done + entered-in-error observations.
    isRecontactingAdditionalFindings(Date) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
    Checks if "Rekontaktierung Zusatzbefund" is permitted (via single L1 code or all L2 codes).
    isRecontactingAdditions(Date) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
    Checks if "Rekontaktierung Ergänzungen" is permitted (via single L1 code or all L2 codes).
    isRecontactingAllowed(Date) - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiConsent
    Checks if recontacting the patient for further surveys is allowed.
    isSameCalendarDay(Date, Date) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.generic.time.DateTools
     
    isScopeActivatedViaParameters(List, DataItemContext) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.controller.DataRetrievalController
    Checks if a specific scope is activated via parameters, given a list of scopes and a data item context.
    isSemiStationary() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Is the case type semi stationary?
    isSnomedCodeInProcedure(MiiProcedure, Collection) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.misc.FhirProcedureTools
    Checks whether a given MiiProcedure contains any coding whose system equals SNOMED and whose code is contained in the provided collection of SNOMED CT codes.
    isSupplyContact() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.fhir.resources.MiiEncounter
    Determines whether the passed encounter type is a supply contact ("Versorgungsstellenkontakt").
    isUsed() - Method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.auth.RestConsumer
     
    isWithinPeriod(Date, Period) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.utilities.generic.time.DateTools
    Checks whether a given Date is within the specified Period, including the start and end dates.
    isYearMonthInQuarter(YearMonth, String) - Static method in class de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboardlogic.DashboardDataItemLogic
    Checks whether a YearMonth falls within the specified calendar quarter.
